chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2060 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.8115/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.8116/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For orders on CMA No.8117/2025 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 16.12.2025 Mr. Nazir Ahmed Junejo, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Through the instant Constitutional Petition, the petitioner seeks quashment of FIR No. 36 of 2024, registered under Sections 302, 324, 148 and 149 PPC at Police Station Wada Machhiyoon, District Khairpur. We have perused the material available on record. It transpires that the FIR, quashment whereof is sought through the present petition, has already been challaned before the competent Court of law and the matter is presently pending trial. Since the case has already been challaned, an alternate and efficacious remedy is available to the petitioner to approach the trial Court, in the first instance, for appropriate relief under Sections 249-A and 265-K CrPC, as the case may be. In view of the above, the instant petition is dismissed in limine, along with the listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
